snippet.title: BARUCH HASHEM ADONAI - Dunsin Oyekan ft. @theophilussunday..
snippet.description:
In Scripture, “Blessed is He who comes in the Name of the Lord” is the cry that welcomed Jesus’ triumphant entry. It is a sound that precedes divine visitation, the proclamation that the Lord is coming into a people, a territory, a nation.

Today, Baruch Hashem Adonai is a prophetic chant released over the earth. It is not merely about the second coming of Christ, but about a present invasion — the Lord coming again and again into homes, families, churches, cities, and nations, until His will is done on earth as it is in heaven.

This is the sound of nations lifting the Name of the Lord into the atmosphere.
From continent to continent.
From family altars to townhalls.
From the rising of the sun to the setting of the same.
As we bless the Name, we make room for His reign. As we lift the cry, we announce His rule. As we sing Baruch Hashem Adonai, we declare that the King is welcome.

Let the nations resound with the cry:
Blessed be the Name of the Lord.
Baruch Hashem Adonai.

Then those who went before and those who followed cried out, saying:
“Hosanna!
‘Blessed is He who comes in the name of the Lord!’
 Blessed is the kingdom of our father David
That comes in the name of the Lord!
Hosanna in the highest!” And Jesus went into Jerusalem and into the temple. So when He had looked around at all things, as the hour was already late, He went out to Bethany with the twelve. Mark 11:9-10

Blessed be the name of the Lord
From this time forth and forevermore! Psalms 113:2

snippet.title: Bairan – Animated Love Story | Banjaare (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Bairan was never meant to be a hit.

We made Bairan for hearts, not for trends, not for reels, not for charts

No label. No big budget. Just two Brothers and a feeling.

We shot a real music video in Chandigarh.
We trusted the wrong person.
And received cheap quality.
That video almost destroyed this song.
So we cancelled everything.
We uploaded only the audio through DistroKid, with no marketing, no plans.
Then something magical happened.
YouTube algorithm picked Bairan.
People started listening.
People started feeling it.
People made it viral.
And suddenly, Bairan was no longer OUR song.
It became YOUR song.
That’s why we decided to create this animated music video.
Because when characters are animated, everyone can see themselves in the story.
Every broken heart becomes the hero.
Every lover becomes the character.

This video is dedicated to every person who felt Bairan.
This is your story.
This is your song.


Song Credits: 
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10

Special Thanks To - Jayant Kamboj , Rajkumari

https://open.spotify.com/track/4iLMuGacSurMAKeQyIwFeJ?si=XhB3Yr_DSdiQjMaq7OSobw

https://music.apple.com/in/song/bairan/1868495536

Lyrics:-

मनै सांभ-सांभ राखे
तेरे झांझरा के जोड़े
मेरी गेल रो-रो ये भी
छोरी बावले से होरे

मन्ने आये जावे ख्याल तेरे
खाये जावे ख्याल तेरे
जीण कोन्या देती 
हाय...
बैरी तन्हाई मनै 

गीता में गाई कदे
छाती के लगाई मनै
जित भी गया रै 
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई मनै

सांभ-सांभ राखी बहुत
छाती के लगाई मनै
जित भी गया रै
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई मनै

हो... 
मारया - मारया फिरै
देख हाल तू बिचारे का
तेरे बिना जीणा भी
के जीणा बंजारे का

खोया रहूँ याद तेरी
कर क नादानियां
बटुवे में राखूँ तेरी
सांभ के निशानियां

तेरे बिना काल होरया
ठीक कोन्या हाल मेरा
हाथ जोड़ूँ राम देदे
सांसा ते रिहाई मनै

गीता में गाई कदे
छाती के लगाई मनै
जित भी गया रै 
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई मनै

सांभ-सांभ राखी बहुत
छाती के लगाई रै
जित भी गया रै
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई रै

ज तू थोड़ी घबरा ज्या
मेरी याद तन्नै आ ज्या
तू दे दिये आवाज रै मैं
आ जाऊँगा

तोडूँ दुनिया की रीत
रै के हार रै के जीत
मनै चहिये तेरी प्रीत
मैं निभा जाऊँगा

देख बावला बणा गी
मन्ने लिखना सिखा गी
हाय... नोच-नोच खागी
तेरी बैरण जुदाई मनै

गीता में गाई कदे
छाती के लगाई मनै
जित भी गया रै 
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई मनै

सांभ-सांभ राखी बहुत
छाती के लगाई रै
जित भी गया रै
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई रै

आज तांई निभाऊँ जो सी
कसम थी खाई मनै
ज़िंदगी सारी या मेरी
तेरे लेखे लाई मनै

snippet.title: Aspirants Season 3 - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Aspirants Season 3 Official Trailer 
Starring Naveen Kasturia, Sunny Hinduja, Jatin Goswami, Abhilash Thapliyal, Shivankit Singh Parihar, Namita Dubey, Tengam Celine
Directed by Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish
The Viral Fever Production

Official Release Date - March 13, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Inquiry begins on DM Abhilash after ALC Sandeep Ohlan’s allegations putting his personal relationship with Deepa, Guri, Dhairya, SK & Sandeep at stake and disrupting his professional goals against a new rival.
